title: The Philosophy of Effective Altruism
subtitle: 如何用理性思维最大化你的善行

paragraphs.en: Effective altruism represents a philosophical movement that applies evidence and reason to determine the most effective ways to benefit others. Rather than following emotional impulses, effective altruists analyze which interventions save the most lives or reduce the most suffering per dollar donated.
paragraphs.zh: 有效利他主义是一场哲学运动，应用证据和理性来确定造福他人的最有效方式。有效利他主义者不是跟随情感冲动，而是分析哪些干预措施每捐赠一美元能挽救最多生命或减少最多痛苦。

paragraphs.en: The movement encourages donors to prioritize causes with the greatest potential impact. Research suggests that fighting tropical diseases in developing countries often saves lives more cost-effectively than popular causes in wealthy nations. Effective altruists argue that geography should not determine whose suffering matters most.
paragraphs.zh: 该运动鼓励捐赠者优先考虑具有最大潜在影响的事业。研究表明，在发展中国家抗击热带疾病通常比富裕国家的热门事业更能有效地挽救生命。有效利他主义者认为，地理位置不应决定谁的痛苦更重要。

paragraphs.en: Career choice becomes an ethical consideration within effective altruism. Some advocates encourage earning high salaries specifically to donate significant portions to effective charities—a strategy called earning to give. Others recommend pursuing careers directly addressing global problems, such as pandemic preparedness or AI safety research.
paragraphs.zh: 在有效利他主义框架中，职业选择成为一种伦理考量。一些倡导者鼓励赚取高薪，专门用于向有效慈善机构捐赠大部分收入——这种策略被称为“为捐而赚”。其他人则建议从事直接解决全球问题的职业，如大流行病准备或AI安全研究。

paragraphs.en: Critics argue that effective altruism overlooks systemic injustice while focusing on individual charity. Some suggest that prioritizing quantifiable outcomes neglects causes with less measurable but equally important impacts. The movement's association with controversial figures has also generated skepticism about its broader implications.
paragraphs.zh: 批评者认为，有效利他主义在关注个人慈善的同时忽视了系统性的不公正。一些人认为，优先考虑可量化的结果会忽视那些影响力难以衡量但同样重要的事业。该运动与争议人物的关联也引发了对其更广泛影响的怀疑。

paragraphs.en: Despite controversies, effective altruism has channeled billions toward pressing global problems. Organizations guided by these principles have distributed millions of insecticide-treated bed nets and deworming treatments. Whether or not one fully embraces the philosophy, its emphasis on evidence-based giving has elevated standards in philanthropic practice.
paragraphs.zh: 尽管存在争议，有效利他主义已经将数十亿美元引导到紧迫的全球问题上。以这些原则为指导的组织已经分发了数百万顶经杀虫剂处理的蚊帐和驱虫治疗。无论是否完全接受这一哲学，其对循证捐赠的强调已经提升了慈善实践的标准。
